calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Young S. Lee, Esq. and Dean A. Hanley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Paul & Hanley, LLP.
James C. Harvey, Esq. appeared for defendant Sandra Evangelista, a conservatee of the Orange County Public Guardian.
Defendants Margaret Jones, Melanie Bailey (Lomeli) and Robert J. Jones, Jr. were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 2, 2008.
Defaults were entered against defendants Cheryl Ann Jones and Robin R. Jones on January 17, 2008 & October 2, 2008, respectively.
Does 1-20 were dismissed today, March 16, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules that the defendant-heirs shall receive the funds from the net settlements negotiated on their behalf as follows:

Margaret Jones - 50%
Melanie Bailey (Lomeli) - 16 2/3%
Robert J. Jones, Jr. - 16 2/3%
Sandra Evangelista - 16 2/3%
Robin R. Jones - 0%
Cheryl Ann Jons - 0%

Additionally, plaintiff Paul & Hanley, LLP shall be awarded attorneys' fees in the amount of $9,900, and costs in the amount of $3,012.38. The personal injury settlement of $8,345.72, which plaintiff is presently holding on behalf of Robin R. Jones, and Cheryl Ann Jones, shall be distributed to the children-heirs of the decedent who have appeared in this action - Melani Baily (Lomeli) Robert J. Jones, Jr. and Sandra Evangelista.

Future settlements in SFSC action #447184 shall be distributed to the defendant-heirs at the precentage rates set forth above.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
